identity.name: Clockwork Frontier
identity.summary: A fading industrial frontier where rumor and ritual shape survival.

hard_rules.title: Power Has A Cost
hard_rules.description: Any major supernatural act leaves a visible consequence.

soft_rules.title: Rumors Travel Fast
soft_rules.description: Important actions tend to become known beyond the local scene.

regions.name: Ironhollow
regions.summary: A soot-stained rail town built around a failing refinery.

active_features.notes: Public standing influences how settlements react.

meta_rules.title: Settlements Remember
meta_rules.description: Communities slowly accumulate opinions about repeated behavior.
